generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static friction loss identification for robot control accuracy improvement"
]
instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kinetic friction loss identification for robot control accuracy improvement"
]
instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Viscous friction loss identification for robot control accuracy improvement"
]
instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction data and robot motion"
]
instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from friction data to enhance robot motion accuracy"
]
instance SystemModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from SysML system modeling"
]
instance AssetDescriptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from AAS asset description"
]
instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from MQTT data streaming"
]
instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System modeling service using SysML",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemModelInsight
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]
instance AssetDescriptionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset description service using AAS",
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetDescriptionInsight
]
instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT-based data streaming service",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]
instance RobotControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for improving robot motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]
instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset description",
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetDescriptionService
]
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]
instance SINUMERIK840DslControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller",
    DTDFVocab:enables RobotControlService
]
instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]
instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for structural description of the MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for dynamics and friction simulation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance MqttDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]
instance MeasuredPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance MeasuredAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance MeasuredAcceleration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data derived from angular velocity",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current measured by current sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DerivedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from input current and motor parameters",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MqttDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor of the MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttDataStream
]
instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox of the MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttDataStream
]
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for motor current in MABI MAX 100 first axis",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MqttDataStream
]
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]
instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]
instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]
instance FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
]
instance IndustrialRobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxis
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow composed of purpose (FrictionDerivation), asset (Mabi), data traces (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out, ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out), sources (sensors, processing components), processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB), and models (SysML SystemModel, Simulink models for motor, gearwheel, gearbox), linked for traceability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), used for continuous friction identification during robot operation to account for wear, different tools, or applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standard for asset description and SysML standard for system modeling."
]
